findings.description: API REST endpoints (e.g. GET /api/clusters) return 404 via ingress; TRPC endpoints at /trpc/* work correctly. This is a known routing quirk — the OpenAPI REST layer only works via direct API server access.
findings.impact: None for UI — frontend uses TRPC directly

findings.description: test-cluster-minikube has active Warning events for probe failures (readiness/liveness probes timing out). This is expected behavior for a degraded cluster state.
API tokens list has accumulated test tokens in settings page. Not a regression.
